recent_projects.name: numcodecs-huffman
recent_projects.summary: Huffman codec for the `numcodecs` buffer compression API

recent_projects.name: openmeter
recent_projects.summary: Client for OpenMeter: Real-Time and Scalable Usage Metering
recent_projects.author: Andras Toth

recent_projects.name: PraisonAI
recent_projects.summary: PraisonAI is an AI Agents Framework with Self Reflection. PraisonAI application combines PraisonAI Agents, AutoGen, and CrewAI into a low-code solution for building and managing multi-agent LLM systems, focusing on simplicity, customisation, and efficient human-agent collaboration.
recent_projects.author: Mervin Praison

recent_projects.name: buz
recent_projects.summary: Buz is a set of light, simple and extensible implementations of event, command and query buses.
recent_projects.author: Luis Pintado Lozano

recent_projects.name: ohmyscrapper
recent_projects.summary: This project aims to create a text-based scraper containing links to create a final PDF with general information about job openings.
recent_projects.author: Cesar Cardoso

recent_projects.name: odoo-addon-fs-storage
recent_projects.summary: Implement the concept of Storage with amazon S3, sftp...
recent_projects.author: ACSONE SA/NV, Odoo Community Association (OCA)

recent_no_license_projects.name: numcodecs-huffman
recent_no_license_projects.summary: Huffman codec for the `numcodecs` buffer compression API

recent_no_license_projects.name: ohmyscrapper
recent_no_license_projects.summary: This project aims to create a text-based scraper containing links to create a final PDF with general information about job openings.

recent_no_license_projects.name: cognite-toolkit
recent_no_license_projects.summary: Official Cognite Data Fusion tool for project templates and configuration deployment
recent_no_license_projects.author: Cognite AS

recent_no_license_projects.name: numcodecs-tokenize
recent_no_license_projects.summary: Tokenization codec for the `numcodecs` buffer compression API

recent_no_license_projects.name: praisonaiagents
recent_no_license_projects.summary: Praison AI agents for completing complex tasks with Self Reflection Agents
recent_no_license_projects.author: Mervin Praison

recent_no_license_projects.name: amulet-map-editor
recent_no_license_projects.summary: A new Minecraft world editor and converter that supports all versions since Java 1.12 and Bedrock 1.7.
recent_no_license_projects.author: James Clare, Ben Gothard et al.

recent_no_license_projects.name: liberal-alpha
recent_no_license_projects.summary: Liberal Alpha Python SDK for interacting with gRPC-based backend
recent_no_license_projects.author: capybaralabs

recent_no_license_projects.name: curies
recent_no_license_projects.summary: Idiomatic conversion between URIs and compact URIs (CURIEs)
